name: Lead Research Coordination - Tier 1 Production Example

nodes.name: Schedule: Every Weekday 9am
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Scheduled automation - triggers daily lead research pipeline

nodes.name: Fetch Target Accounts from Google Sheets
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Deterministic fetch - gets list of companies to research from spreadsheet

nodes.name: Filter Accounts for Research
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Deterministic filtering - select accounts that need research

nodes.name: Process Each Account
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Process one account at a time to avoid overwhelming downstream systems

nodes.name: Call Tier 3 Research Agent
nodes.notes: TIER 1 ORCHESTRATION: Calls Tier 3 agent to perform autonomous research

nodes.name: Format Research Data
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Deterministic data transformation and validation

nodes.name: Update CRM with Research Data
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Store research data in CRM for sales team access

nodes.name: Check if Ready for Email Generation
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Simple conditional - only trigger email gen if we found contact info

nodes.name: Trigger Tier 2 Email Generation
nodes.notes: TIER 1 ORCHESTRATION: Triggers Tier 2 workflow for personalized email generation

nodes.name: Update Tracking Spreadsheet
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Update tracking spreadsheet with research status

nodes.name: Merge Paths
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Merge both paths back together

nodes.name: Generate Summary Report
nodes.notes: TIER 1: Create execution summary for logging/monitoring

parameters.subject: Daily Lead Research Complete - {{$json.total_processed}} accounts processed

nodes.notes: TIER 1: Notify sales team of completed research
